evidence.content_preview: All trades must originate from one or more of the following frameworks: SMC: SH+BMS+RTO...

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The Boom 1000 Index is in a dominant HTF bearish trend across MN1, W1, and D1. While the MTF (H12-H1) experienced a bullish retracement, the LTF (M30, M15, M5, M1) has confirmed a bearish structural shift (CHoCH and BMS), signaling a pro-trend reversal. We identified a high-confluence M15 SH+BMS+CHOCH+FVG+OB+OTE+RTO bearish setup (candidate_id: BOOM 1000 INDEX_SH_BMS_RTO_BEARISH_BEARISH_14361.8505_f14239ca) with a BSL sweep of 5.01 pips above 14390.167. We place a LIMIT order at the entry price of 14361.8505, with a structural stop loss at 14402.6895 (above the OB upper bound of 14395.883). Our targets are structured to run from liquidity to liquidity, with TP1 at 14280.0, TP2 at 14200.0, and TP3 at 14174.103 (the major M15 swing low), offering an excellent risk-to-reward ratio of 4.60R.

htf_bias.notes: HTF trend is strongly bearish across MN1, W1, and D1. D1 has confirmed bearish CHoCH and BMS events.

mtf_bias.notes: MTF has shifted bearish on M30 and M15, confirming a pro-trend reversal from the H12-H1 bullish retracement.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup...

stop_loss.reason: Placed above the M15 Order Block upper bound of 14395.883 with a protective offset to avoid stop hunts.

take_profits.basis: Nearest structural support and M15 FVG fill zone
H1 Order Block and FVG mitigation level
Major swing low / sell-side liquidity pool on M15
